title: Millionfold v0.1.0
content:
Millionfold’s first release establishes a robust desktop pipeline for batch image trimming, padding, and organization. Built for fast workflow prep, it allows direct path manipulation, custom background fill values, monthly date-sorting, and filename conflict handling.

What changed:

  • Custom Canvas Padding: Added background tolerance slider and hex color picker to pad/expand images to custom backgrounds (e.g. off-white) rather than defaulting only to pure white.
  • Directory Browser & Folder Creation: Integrated directory browsing (supporting logical drives) and added the ability to create subdirectories directly inside the dialog.
  • Duplicate Resolution & Monthly Sorting: Added output organization into monthly YYYY MM subfolders, with copy resolution modes to append parenthesis suffixes or move duplicate names to separate, context-preserved folders.
  • Single Centered Image Feed: Added option to toggle between historical scrolling grids, a centered preview flashing currently processed images, or both combined.
